name: Chicken Broth
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds chicken backs, necks and/or wings
1 cup coarsely chopped celery with leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart Dutch oven, combine chicken and water. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; simmer partially covered for 30 minutes. Skim off any scum that rises to the surface.
3. Add remaining ingredients except 1/4 teaspoon salt; simmer partially covered for an additional 4 hours.
4. Remove bones; strain broth. Stir in 1/4 teaspoon salt. Cool uncovered in refrigerator.
5. Cover and store in refrigerator or freezer. Skim fat from broth before using in recipe.
